REST API model representing a single named-entity recognition (NER) tag extracted from a digitized document.

NERTag.Type - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.model.ner
Enumerates the recognized categories of named entities, such as persons, locations, corporations, events, and miscellaneous types.

NoopComparator<T> - Class in io.goobi.viewer.controller.sorting
No-operation comparator that always returns 0, effectively treating all elements as equal and preserving the original iteration order.
NoopComparator() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.sorting.NoopComparator
 
NoopTranslator<T> - Class in io.goobi.viewer.controller.sorting
No-operation ITranslator implementation that returns the raw string produced by the provided stringifier function without any resource-bundle lookup or locale transformation.
NoopTranslator(Function<T, String>) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.controller.sorting.NoopTranslator
 
NoopVariableReplacer - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.variables
A no-operation VariableReplacer that is initialised with an empty variable map and leaves all input strings unchanged.

NOT_WORD_PATTERN - Static variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.FuzzySearchTerm
Regex matching anything not matching FuzzySearchTerm.WORD_PATTERN, including an empty string.
NotAllowedExceptionMapper - Class in io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.exceptions
Maps NotAllowedException (HTTP 405) to a JSON response that includes the required Allow header listing supported HTTP methods for the requested path, as mandated by RFC 9110 §15.5.6.
NotAllowedExceptionMapper() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.exceptions.NotAllowedExceptionMapper

NumericComparator<T> - Class in io.goobi.viewer.controller.sorting
